name: golang-golang-x-mod-dev
title: golang-golang-x-mod-dev
description:
Go module mechanics libraries
This repository holds packages for writing tools
that work directly with Go module mechanics.
That is, it is for direct manipulation of Go modules themselves.
.
It is NOT about supporting general development tools that
need to do things like load packages in module mode.
That use case, where modules are incidental rather than the focus,
should remain in x/tools, specifically x/tools/go/packages.
.
The specific case of loading packages should still be done by
invoking the go command, which remains the single point of
truth for package loading algorithms.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-mod-dev because Go module mechanics libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-mod-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-mod-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-mod-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
